summary: Architecture for legion advance command and auto-progression
keyDecisions: advance reuses existing POST /workers dispatch logic via new POST /state/advance endpoint
IssueTracker interface extended with transitionIssue() and removeLabel() for transition_to_* actions
Auto-progression is opt-in via LEGION_AUTO_ADVANCE=true env var
Envoy fast path + periodic poll fallback for auto-progression trigger
--stage flag on advance is equivalent to dispatch --force
openQuestions: GitHub Projects V2 field/option IDs for status transitions — check github.ts
Linear workflow state IDs — check linear.ts
Does daemon currently subscribe to Envoy topics for worker-done events?
